name: Kakashi Hatake
description:
When a mysterious woman enters Konoha under Tsunade’s summons, the village finds itself at the edge of secrets it cannot yet see. She is a lone shinobi, unbound by loyalty to any land, known only by whispers and the ramen stand owner who once served her in silence.

To the Hokage, she is the key to a mission that cannot be spoken aloud. To Kakashi, she is an unsettling presence—too skilled to ignore, too secretive to trust. As their paths cross in the shadows of Konoha, questions rise: is she an ally, or the spark of a hidden danger? And in a world already threatened by enemies on every side, can Kakashi afford to let his guard slip against someone who walks so easily in the dark?
creator: Yoshidayu
